salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id FROM Supplier__c WHERE UUID__c = ':supplierUuid' LIMIT 1

salesforce:create.salesforce:records: #[[{ UUID__c: vars.contactId, Supplier__c: vars.supplierSfId, LastName: payload.name, (Email: payload.email) if (payload.email != null), (Phone: payload.phone) if (payload.phone != null), (Title: payload.title) if (payload.title != null) }]]

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] Contact created: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT UUID__c, Name, Email, Phone, Title FROM Contact WHERE UUID__c = ':contactUuid' LIMIT 1

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "Raw Query Result: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var item = payload[0] --- { id: item.UUID__c, name: item.Name, email: item.Email, phone: item.Phone, title: item.Title }

salesforce:upsert.salesforce:records: #[[{ UUID__c: vars.id, (LastName: payload.name) if (payload.name?), (Email: payload.email) if (payload.email != null), (Phone: payload.phone) if (payload.phone != null), (Title: payload.title) if (payload.title != null) }]]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id FROM Contact WHERE UUID__c = ':contactUuid' LIMIT 1

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] Contact deleted: $(vars.id)"]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 import dw::util::Pagination output application/java --- var safeSupplierId = if (Pagination::isValidUuid(vars.id)) vars.id else "" var safeBefore = if (vars.beforeCursor != null and Pagination::isValidUuid(vars.beforeCursor)) vars.beforeCursor else null var safeAfter = if (vars.afterCursor != null and Pagination::isValidUuid(vars.afterCursor)) vars.afterCursor else null var baseQuery = "SELECT UUID__c, Name, Email, Phone, Title FROM Contact WHERE Supplier__r.UUID__c = '" ++ safeSupplierId ++ "'" --- if (safeBefore != null) baseQuery ++ " AND UUID__c < '" ++ safeBefore ++ "' ORDER BY UUID__c DESC LIMIT " ++ (vars.pageSize + 1) else if (safeAfter != null) baseQuery ++ " AND UUID__c > '" ++ safeAfter ++ "' ORDER BY UUID__c ASC LIMIT " ++ (vars.pageSize + 1) else baseQuery ++ " ORDER BY UUID__c ASC LIMIT " ++ (vars.pageSize + 1)

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "Raw Query Result: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]
